title: Opinions + Next Steps
content: Give opinions on the ideas in multimodel_conversation_DAG.md. Summarize themes and propose next steps for a CLI to coordinate GPT, Claude, Gemini, and Grok via copy/paste.

title: Opinion+Next
content: Short opinion: Embrace DAG-based collaboration; implement fanout, ingest, ranking. Next steps: add evaluation prompts, merge summaries, and MD export.

title: Opinion+Next
content: Structured view: agree with DAG, add artifacts, budget control. Next: minimal CLI, clear schemas, ASCII graph.
